privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating and sending synthetic data for three custom metrics ('apps.payment_service.response_time_ms', 'apps.payment_service.error_rate', and 'apps.payment_service.requests_per_sec') as outlined in the prompt. This synthetic data is then correlated with a background infrastructure metric ('servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization'), which is populated by the environment with real-world EC2 server metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset. All metadata claims regarding the expected dashboard name ('Payment Service Health'), occupation ('QA Engineer'), and industry ('E-commerce') are explicitly corroborated by the prompt instructions and verifier scripts.
